event: bilateral ileofemoral acute-on-chronic deep vein thrombosis
bilateral femoropopliteal acute-on-chronic deep vein thrombosis
phlegmasia alba dolens of bilateral lower extremities
spontaneous decompression via erosion into inferior vena cava
cavernous transformation of ileofemoral venous network
no evidence of active vegetation on echocardiography
significant caval compression by aneurysm sac
refractory to open thrombectomy via common femoral venotomy
bilateral axillary unifemoral bypass grafts placed
recovery in intensive care unit for 4 days
